did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article discussing updated techniques for melanoma diagnosis. While it mentions that artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning algorithms are being integrated into melanoma diagnostics to analyze dermoscopic images, it does not report that the authors of this specific paper used AI to obtain their own study results. The paper focuses on reviewing existing technologies (Category I-IV) such as dermoscopy, total body photography, and spectroscopy, rather than presenting new experimental results derived from an AI model.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
